3250120.name: Cursed Hours
3250120.description:
Cursed Hours is a terrifying dark psychological horror game. You play as a thief who breaks into an old, abandoned mansion, hoping to find treasure. But soon after entering, you realize something is wrong. You’re not alone.

Strange things begin to happen. Shadows move on their own. Doors slam shut. Mysterious noises echo through the dark halls. The mansion itself feels alive, and something sinister is watching you.

            As the night goes on, your fear grows. You can’t tell what’s real and what isn’t. Escape becomes impossible. The deeper you explore, the more you uncover the mansion’s dark secrets. But when you finally learn who—or what—is haunting you, the truth will shock you.

           Cursed Hours uses Unreal Engine 5 to create a dark and realistic atmosphere. Every detail of the mansion is brought to life. The game is filled with tension and fear, making every step a new nightmare. The mansion wants to trap you, and it may be too late to escape.
3250120.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
